title: Barabbas #0912
definition:
Barabbas = "son of a father or master"

 1) the captive robber whom the Jews begged Pilate to release
    instead of Christ
nasbUsage:
Definition: Barabbas = "son of a father or master"

 1) the captive robber whom the Jews begged Pilate to release
    instead of Christ

    NASB:  son of Abba, Barabbas, the Isr. robber released instead of Christ:
